stemHtml: What option describes an irreversible flight control system?

options.a: The flight controls can only be moved in one direction from the control lever in the cockpit.
options.b: The flight controls are directly linked with a cable to the control lever in the cockpit, which also provides direct feedback to the pilot when the aerodynamic surface controls are moved.
options.c: If the cockpit controls are moved, the aerodynamic surface controls move, but the system is without a direct mechanical feedback from the control surface to the cockpit controls.
options.d: There is a direct mechanical linkage connecting the control lever and the autopilot.
